docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 SERVED JAN-18-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEVORE, TIGER
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF JEROME, DAVID

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DAVID JEROME IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TIGER DEVORE IS PRESENT. PER CCP CODE 116.340 (E) - (G) MATTER CAN NOT BE HEARD NOR PROCEED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JEROME, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT DEVORE, TIGER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
